_doc: Name-ambiguity pins — the durable fix for wrong entity matches. build-data consults these at read time; enrichers should prefer a pinned id over a name search. Keys are the scrobble artist name. Fields: mbid/spotify/discogs = canonical ids; clearStyles = drop this artist's (wrong) Discogs styles; clearLife = drop its (wrong) MB life-span; origin/life/gender = hard overrides; note = why.

Bleach.note: Japanese punk band (Okinawa, 1998–2009). Name collides with German house + shoegaze Bleach.

daine.note: Melbourne hyperpop artist. Discogs matched a wrong classical 'Daine' (Baroque/Organ) — was polluting the Style-Atlas Organ row.

Brutus.note: Belgian post-hardcore trio (formed ~2013). MB matched an unrelated 1960s act → bogus 'since 1966' elder.

Loathe.note: Liverpool metalcore/shoegaze band (formed ~2014). MB matched an unrelated Maltese 'Loathe' → wrongly placed the map bubble in Malta.

Bloodywood.note: New Delhi folk-metal band. MB matched a wrong Chinese entity → the bubble landed in China.
